question: Implement GeGLU (Gated Exponential Linear Unit) activation. GeGLU splits the input tensor into two halves, applies GELU to the first half (gate), applies sigmoid to the second half (value), and multiplies them together.
code_hint: Split input into two halves, apply F.gelu to gate half and torch.sigmoid to value half, then multiply.
